violations.text: No allergy statement was present at the time of inspection. PIC wrote out statement and placed at counter during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2024
Ice was observed in hand washing sink at the time of inspection. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Recently prepared tuna and turkey were observed held at 45-48 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff placed excess turkey in refrigerator; tuna was placed in freezer to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024
No allergy statement was present at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024

Chicken and cheese were observed held at 47-48 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed excess cheese and chicken into pans and placed in refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024

The white refrigerator was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Establishment to monitor temperatures. NO items requiring refrigeration are to be held in this unit. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Soups were observed in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep at temperatures of 47-49 degrees. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024
Grease trap is lacking grease pan. Inspector observed grease trap draining into a bucket. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024
